name: Lumae Analysis
author: Lumae
description: Precomputes Lumae loudness and MixRamp profiles for server-side volume normalization and SmoothFade.

versions.changelog: Make personal versus shared collection scope explicit and add principal-scoped, checksummed JSON backups with full-library and per-collection export plus safe additive restore in the web manager.
Fix the collection library track query on PostgreSQL by sorting on the source author column instead of a nested SELECT alias, restoring initial browsing and search.

Replace the basic add dialog with an art-first Albums, Tracks, and Artists library workbench; add categorized search, artist and album drill-down, provider track/disc numbers, bulk collection management, cover art, and credential-safe audio previews.
Expose enabled Living Collections in the Plugins menu, restore opaque high-contrast dialogs, and fix Add music requests so selected albums and tracks are persisted with visible progress and errors.
Add opt-in Living Collections with mixed album and track membership, a responsive AudioMuse manager, per-user storage, revisions, idempotent mutations, and incremental sync.
Vectorize the BS.1770 biquad filter with SciPy so loudness and MixRamp profiles are ready before playback catches the analysis queue.
Add Queue Whole Library to enqueue every missing, stale, or changed Lumae profile in 250-track worker jobs while keeping Catch Up Now for one batch.
